summary: Enabled Anthropic prompt caching through OpenRouter by adding cache_control: {"type": "ephemeral"} to LLM requests, which provides 90% savings on cache reads (0.1x input price) for cached system prompt prefix. Fixed HTTP headers per OpenRouter documentation: changed HTTP-Referer from https://github.com/project-memory to http://localhost (appropriate for local CLI tools) and X-Title from 'Project Memory Build' to 'project-memory'.
